description:
An open-source ebook reader designed for immersive and deep reading experiences.

Readest is a modern, feature-rich ebook reader designed for avid readers offering seamless cross-platform access, powerful tools, and an intuitive interface to elevate your reading experience.
Release Highlight
- Bilingual TTS: You can now choose voices for each language in bilingual text-to-speech mode
- Settings Layout: Improved header layout in the settings dialog for different screen sizes
- CSS Fixes: Corrected anchor text color and fixed image dimensions within paragraphs
What's Changed
- css: unchange color for anchor children, unchange only image dimension in span, closes #1251 and #1252 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1256
- layout: more responsive layout for the header in settings dialog by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1257
- tts: select voice in bilingual TTS mode by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1263
- release: version 0.9.50 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1264
Full Changelog: https://github.com/readest/readest/compare/v0.9.49...v0.9.50
